text: Welcome to the NovaTech deal channel! This is our coordination space for onboarding and closing. Let's make this smooth. 🚀
Great to have you here Marco and Yara. I'll be coordinating on the logistics side. First step: we need to schedule the legal review call with our counsel.
Grazie both! Really excited to be working with Vertex Minds. What documents should we have ready for the legal team?
Standard items: incorporation docs, cap table, any existing IP assignments, employee agreements. Tomás can send the checklist. We'll also need proof of insurance.
Sending the full doc list now via email. Timeline: legal review next Wednesday (Nov 19th) at 14:00 CET. Does that work for both of you?
Nov 19 at 14:00 works perfectly. Yara and I will both be on the call.
Quick question: does Vertex Minds offer data infrastructure support for scaling LLM deployments? We're considering moving some inference to your cloud, but wanted to confirm what's available.
Good question. We don't manage infrastructure directly, but we have strong relationships with compute partners (Lambda, Crusoe, others). Happy to make intros if that helps. Let's discuss post-close.
We can also connect you with our Technical Due Diligence contact if you want a third-party review of your deployment strategy. Some of our other portfolio companies have found that valuable.
Just confirming: we're still on for legal review tomorrow at 14:00 CET with Marco and Yara. Sent the Zoom link to both of you.
All set. Prof. Caruso replied to my email and is available if you want to do reference check calls this week. Just need dates.
Excellent. Thursday or Friday work for us. Tomás will coordinate the exact time. We'll keep it brief — 20 minutes max.
Post-legal-review: we're on track for signature by Nov 22. Fund will hit your account by Nov 24. Any blockers or issues we should know about?
Legal review went smoothly. Minor comment on the IP assignment clause from our side, but nothing substantial. Marco will send via email.
One last thing: onboarding to your portfolio network. What's the cadence for founder office hours, portfolio syncs, etc?
Monthly portfolio founder dinners (first Tuesday of each month), optional office hours (Thursdays), and ad-hoc support from Tomás. We'll send a full schedule post-close.
SIGNED! Docs are now with our legal team for final processing. We'll have funds to you by EOD tomorrow. Congrats team NovaTech! 🎉
This is incredible! Thank you all for such a smooth, professional process. Can't wait to build with you.
Absolutely. Grazie Vertex Minds team. Let's ship something amazing together.
